eyebrow: Cuisine Palette · Sourced from ingredient & table
tagline: Forty-eight dishes, read for their ingredients, not their menu photo.
metaNote:
Color sourced from ingredient,
plating & the regional table
sourcing: Every palette is sampled from a specific cuisine, dish, or ingredient's real colour — the produce, the spice, the char, the glaze, and the table it is served on. The aim is the colour on the plate in front of you, not the flat brown that stands in for 'food' in stock imagery.

volumes.title: Japanese Cuisine
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol I · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Japanese table, restraint and one clean accent.
preface: Japanese cuisine plates colour with restraint — the pale of rice and tofu, the dark of nori and soy, lacquer black, and one clean accent of salmon, matcha, or pickle. The palette is quiet, fresh, and precise.
Each refuses the over-bright 'sushi platter' cliché: real Japanese plating is mostly muted, with colour used sparingly and exactly.

palettes.title: Sliced fish over vinegared rice on pale wood, with nori, ginger, and wasabi
palettes.source: Color from the sushi counter: vinegared-rice white, salmon coral, tuna deep red, nori black-green, and wasabi green.

swatches.name: Sushi rice, vinegared white
swatches.note: The pale shari beneath the fish.

d.text: Vinegared-rice white is the plate's ground.

s.text: Salmon coral, tuna red, and nori black-green.

a.text: Wasabi green and ginger pink as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Garish rainbow platter. The counter is mostly white rice and muted fish; colour is the salmon and the wasabi, used exactly.

palettes.title: A bowl of whisked matcha beside a seasonal sweet on a lacquer tray
palettes.source: Color from the tea service: vivid matcha green, wagashi pastel, lacquer black, bamboo-whisk cream, and a red-bean accent.

d.text: Vivid matcha green leads the tea service.

s.text: Pastel wagashi, lacquer black, and bamboo cream.

a.text: Red-bean maroon and jade as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muddy tea-brown. The tea service is vivid matcha-green against pastel sweets and black lacquer — a crisp contrast, not brown.

palettes.title: A steaming bowl of tonkotsu broth, chashu, egg, and scallion
palettes.source: Color from the bowl: tonkotsu-broth cream, chashu-pork brown, soft-egg gold, nori black, and a scallion-and-chilli accent.

swatches.name: Chilli oil, red
swatches.note: A swirl of rāyu chilli oil.

d.text: Cream tonkotsu broth fills the bowl.

s.text: Chashu brown, egg gold, and nori black.

a.text: Scallion green and chilli-oil red as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Uniform brown soup. Ramen is pale broth lifted by egg-gold, scallion-green, and chilli-red — composed, not a brown bowl.

palettes.title: A multi-course kaiseki plate of seasonal vegetable, fish, and garnish on ceramic
palettes.source: Color from kaiseki: seasonal-vegetable green, sashimi coral, lacquer-bowl black, dashi-clear gold, and a maple-leaf garnish red.

d.text: Seasonal vegetable green leads the course.

s.text: Coral sashimi, black lacquer, and cream ceramic.

a.text: Maple red and yuzu yellow as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Cluttered bright plating. Kaiseki is spare and seasonal — green, coral, and black, composed with restraint.

volumes.title: Italian Cuisine
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol II · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Italian table, tomato, basil, and flour.
preface: Italian food is built on a few vivid ingredients — tomato red, basil green, the cream of mozzarella and flour, olive-oil gold — against terracotta and marble. The palette is warm, fresh, and confident.
Each refuses the muddy 'red-sauce' brown: real Italian colour is bright tomato and basil, not a heavy gravy.

palettes.title: A Margherita blistered from the oven: tomato, mozzarella, basil on charred crust
palettes.source: Color from the Margherita: San-Marzano tomato red, mozzarella cream, basil green, charred-crust brown-black, and a golden cornicione.

d.text: Golden crust is the pizza's dominant field.

s.text: Tomato red, mozzarella cream, and basil green.

a.text: Char spots and olive-oil gold as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Heavy orange grease. The Margherita is bright tomato, white cheese, and green basil on gold crust — the Italian tricolore, not grease.

palettes.title: Golden egg pasta rolled on flour-dusted marble with a pat of saffron dough
palettes.source: Color from the pasta board: egg-dough gold, '00'-flour white, marble grey-white, semolina yellow, and a tomato-ragù red.

d.text: Golden egg dough is the board's field.

s.text: Flour white, marble grey, and pale semolina.

a.text: Ragù red and parmesan gold as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Beige floury monotone. Fresh pasta is rich egg-gold against white flour and marble — warm and clean, not a dull beige.

palettes.title: Mounded tubs of pistachio, stracciatella, and fragola behind curved glass
palettes.source: Color from the gelateria: pistachio green, stracciatella cream, fragola-strawberry pink, dark-chocolate brown, and a lemon yellow.

d.text: Soft pistachio green leads the counter.

s.text: Cream stracciatella, strawberry pink, and chocolate.

a.text: Lemon yellow and cherry red as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Neon ice-cream brights. Artisan gelato is soft and natural — muted pistachio and cream, not fluorescent tubs.

palettes.title: Caponata, blood-orange, and cannoli on a maiolica-tiled table
palettes.source: Color from Sicily: aubergine-caponata purple, blood-orange red, maiolica yellow-blue, ricotta cream, and a pistachio green.

d.text: Deep aubergine purple leads the Sicilian table.

s.text: Blood-orange red, ochre tile, and ricotta cream.

a.text: Pistachio green and cobalt as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muted rustic browns. The Sicilian table is aubergine purple, blood-orange, and maiolica — saturated southern colour.

volumes.title: Mexican Cuisine
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol III · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Mexican table, chilli, corn, and lime.
preface: Mexican food is a riot of grounded colour — chilli reds and browns, corn yellow, lime and cilantro green, and the deep mahogany of mole — on painted talavera and clay. The palette is warm, earthy, and bright.
Each refuses the cheap 'Tex-Mex orange' cliché: real Mexican colour is complex chilli, deep mole, and fresh lime, not neon cheese.

palettes.title: Dark mahogany mole over turkey with sesame, on a talavera plate
palettes.source: Color from the mole: mahogany mole brown, sesame cream, talavera blue-and-white, chilli-red rim, and a green-herb fleck.

swatches.name: Talavera white, glaze
swatches.note: The white ground of the plate.

d.text: Mahogany mole is the plate's dominant mass.

s.text: Sesame cream, cobalt talavera, and white glaze.

a.text: Chilli-red and cilantro green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Bright orange Tex-Mex. Mole is a deep, complex mahogany on blue talavera — subtle and dark, not neon cheese-sauce.

palettes.kicker: Tacos al pastor · the street stand
palettes.title: Marinated pork shaved off the trompo onto corn tortillas with pineapple and onion
palettes.source: Color from the taco: achiote-pork red-orange, corn-tortilla yellow, pineapple gold, white onion, and cilantro green.

d.text: Achiote pork red-orange leads the taco.

s.text: Corn yellow, pineapple gold, and white onion.

a.text: Cilantro green and salsa red as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat brown meat. Al pastor is bright achiote-red with pineapple gold and cilantro green — vivid and fresh, not a brown filling.

palettes.kicker: Día de Muertos table · the ofrenda
palettes.title: A Day-of-the-Dead altar of marigold, pan de muerto, papel picado, and sugar skulls
palettes.source: Color from the ofrenda: marigold orange, papel-picado magenta, sugar-skull white, candle gold, and a deep altar purple.

swatches.name: Cempasúchil marigold, orange
swatches.note: The flower that guides the dead.

swatches.name: Altar cloth, deep purple
swatches.note: The mourning purple of the cloth.

d.text: Marigold orange dominates the ofrenda.

s.text: Magenta papel picado, white skull, and pan gold.

a.text: Candle gold and altar purple as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muted somber palette. The ofrenda is joyfully vivid — marigold, magenta, and white — a celebration of colour, not a grey mourning.

palettes.title: Grilled corn slathered with crema, chilli, lime, and cotija cheese
palettes.source: Color from elote: charred-corn yellow, crema white, chilli-powder red, cotija crumble pale, and a lime green.

d.text: Charred corn yellow leads the cob.

s.text: White crema, char brown, and cotija cream.

a.text: Chilli red and lime green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Pale plain corn. Elote is bright yellow with white crema, red chilli, and green lime — a vivid street snack, not plain cob.

volumes.title: Indian Cuisine
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol IV · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Indian table, turmeric, chilli, and spice.
preface: Indian food is the most saturated cuisine of all — turmeric gold, chilli red, the green of coriander and mint, and the deep brown of garam masala — set on steel thalis and banana leaf. The palette is hot, layered, and joyful.
Each refuses a flat 'curry brown': real Indian colour is a spectrum of distinct spice hues, not a single gravy.

palettes.kicker: The spice market · the masala stall
palettes.title: Heaped cones of turmeric, chilli, and garam masala under an awning
palettes.source: Color from the spice stall: turmeric gold, chilli red, garam-masala brown, fresh-coriander green, and a paprika orange.

swatches.name: Coriander, fresh green
swatches.note: The leaf and the ground seed.

d.text: Turmeric gold leads the spice stall.

s.text: Chilli red, masala brown, and coriander green.

a.text: Paprika orange and saffron as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Single muddy curry-brown. The spice market is a full saturated spectrum — gold, red, green — each spice its own hue.

palettes.title: A steel thali of dal, sabzi, rice, chutney, and pickle in little katoris
palettes.source: Color from the thali: dal yellow, palak-spinach green, steel-platter grey, tomato-curry red, and a mango-pickle orange.

swatches.name: Dal, turmeric yellow
swatches.note: The lentil dal in its bowl.

d.text: Dal yellow leads the thali's colour.

s.text: Spinach green, steel grey, and curry red.

a.text: Pickle orange and mint green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Brown buffet sludge. A thali is a deliberate arrangement of distinct bright dishes on bright steel — composed, not a brown heap.

palettes.title: Trays of jalebi, barfi, and laddu in saffron, silver-leaf, and pistachio
palettes.source: Color from the sweet shop: jalebi saffron orange, barfi silver-white, pistachio green, gulab-jamun brown, and a rose pink.

d.text: Saffron-orange jalebi leads the trays.

s.text: Silver barfi, pistachio green, and gulab brown.

a.text: Rose pink and silver vark as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Dull beige confection. Mithai is saffron, silver, and pistachio — jewel-bright sweets, not a tray of beige fudge.

palettes.title: Tandoori chicken and naan pulled from the clay oven, charred and spiced
palettes.source: Color from the tandoor: tandoori-red marinade, char-black edge, naan gold, mint-chutney green, and an onion-purple.

d.text: Tandoori red leads the platter.

s.text: Naan gold, char black, and mint green.

a.text: Onion purple and lemon as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat brown grill. Tandoori is vivid red with char-black and green chutney — bright and spiced, not a brown roast.

volumes.title: French Patisserie
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol V · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the pâtisserie, pastel, glaze, and gold.
preface: French pâtisserie is refined pastel and glaze — macaron tints, the gold of butter pastry, glossy fruit glaçage, and chocolate's deep brown — on marble and porcelain. The palette is elegant and confectionery-soft.
Each refuses garish bakery brights: the pâtisserie palette is muted pastel and warm gold, precise and restrained.

palettes.title: A row of macarons in pistachio, rose, lemon, and cassis on white marble
palettes.source: Color from the macaron tray: pistachio green, rose pink, lemon yellow, cassis purple, and a chocolate brown.

d.text: Soft pistachio green leads the tray.

s.text: Rose, lemon, and white marble.

a.text: Cassis purple and chocolate brown as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Fluorescent candy colour. Macarons are delicate naturalistic pastels — soft green, rose, lemon — never neon.

palettes.title: Golden laminated croissants and pains au chocolat in a linen-lined basket
palettes.source: Color from the basket: laminated croissant gold, flaky-crust amber, linen cream, chocolate-baton brown, and an egg-wash sheen.

d.text: Laminated croissant gold is the basket's body.

s.text: Deep amber crust, linen cream, and pale crumb.

a.text: Chocolate baton and egg-wash gold as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Pale doughy beige. Good viennoiserie is deep burnished gold and amber — richly baked, not an underdone beige.

palettes.kicker: Fruit tarts & glaçage · the entremets case
palettes.title: Glossy fruit tarts and mirror-glazed entremets in berry red, kiwi green, and gold
palettes.source: Color from the tart case: glossy berry red, crème-pâtissière cream, kiwi green, apricot-glaze gold, and a blueberry indigo.

d.text: Glossy berry red leads the tart case.

s.text: Cream custard, kiwi green, and gold pastry.

a.text: Apricot glaze and blueberry indigo as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Matte dull fruit. The tart case gleams with mirror-glaze and fresh fruit — glossy red, green, and gold, not a flat bake.

palettes.title: Glazed éclairs in coffee, chocolate, and pink fondant on a steel tray
palettes.source: Color from the éclair tray: coffee-fondant tan, chocolate brown, pink-fondant rose, choux gold, and a pistachio green.

d.text: Coffee-fondant tan leads the tray.

s.text: Chocolate brown, gold choux, and cream filling.

a.text: Pink fondant and pistachio as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Dull beige pastry. The éclair line is glossy coffee, chocolate, and rose glaze — a shiny coloured row, not a beige bake.

volumes.title: New Nordic
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol VI · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Nordic table, forage, sea, and rye.
preface: New Nordic cuisine plates the cold landscape — foraged green, sea grey-blue, rye and birch brown, and the dark of squid ink and berries — on rough ceramic and slate. The palette is muted, natural, and restrained.
Each refuses bright restaurant colour: the Nordic plate is earthy, foraged, and quiet, with one berry or flower as accent.

palettes.title: Foraged herbs, flowers, and vegetables on a rough grey ceramic plate
palettes.source: Color from the foraged course: moss green, rough-ceramic grey, root-vegetable brown, edible-flower violet, and a sea-buckthorn orange.

swatches.name: Foraged herb, moss green
swatches.note: The mix of wild greens and herbs.

d.text: Moss green leads the foraged plate.

s.text: Rough ceramic grey, root brown, and pale cream.

a.text: Violet flower and buckthorn orange as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Bright plated colour. The Nordic plate is muted moss-and-grey with one berry or flower — restrained, not a vivid composition.

palettes.title: Rye-bread open sandwiches topped with herring, egg, dill, and beetroot
palettes.source: Color from the smørrebrød: dark rye brown, pickled-herring silver, egg-yolk gold, dill green, and a beetroot magenta.

d.text: Dark rye brown is the sandwich's base.

s.text: Herring silver, egg gold, and dill green.

a.text: Beetroot magenta and pale crumb as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Bright deli colour. Smørrebrød is dark rye and muted toppings lifted by one magenta beet — earthy, not a vivid sub sandwich.

palettes.kicker: The cold sea · raw shellfish & ice
palettes.title: Oysters, langoustine, and seaweed on crushed ice and slate
palettes.source: Color from the seafood plate: oyster-shell grey, slate dark, ice white, langoustine coral, and a seaweed green.

swatches.name: Oyster shell, grey
swatches.note: The rough shells on the ice.

d.text: Oyster-shell grey leads the seafood plate.

s.text: Slate dark, ice white, and pale brine.

a.text: Langoustine coral and seaweed green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Warm bright seafood boil. The cold-sea plate is grey, slate, and ice with one coral shell — austere, not a red crab boil.

palettes.title: Cured salmon and smoked mackerel with dill and rye crisp on slate
palettes.source: Color from the board: cured-salmon coral, smoked-mackerel silver-brown, slate grey, dill green, and a horseradish white.

d.text: Cured-salmon coral leads the fish board.

s.text: Smoked silver-brown, slate grey, and rye tan.

a.text: Dill green and horseradish white as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Bright deli platter. The Nordic fish board is muted coral and silver on slate — cool and restrained, not a vivid spread.

volumes.title: Levantine & Middle Eastern
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol VII · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the mezze table, herb, sumac, and pomegranate.
preface: Levantine cooking is fresh green herb, creamy beige tahini and hummus, the deep red of sumac and pomegranate, and the gold of olive oil and saffron — on copper and ceramic. The palette is warm, herbal, and jewel-accented.
Each refuses a flat 'hummus beige': the mezze table is bright with herb green, sumac red, and pomegranate ruby.

palettes.kicker: The mezze spread · the shared table
palettes.title: Hummus, baba ghanoush, tabbouleh, and olives across a copper-trimmed table
palettes.source: Color from the mezze: hummus beige, tabbouleh green, sumac-and-paprika red, olive-oil gold, and a pomegranate ruby.

d.text: Warm hummus beige is the table's ground.

s.text: Parsley green, dark olive, and oil gold.

a.text: Sumac red and pomegranate ruby as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Monotone beige dip. The mezze table is bright herb-green and pomegranate-ruby over beige — fresh and jewelled, not bland.

palettes.kicker: The spice souk · the saffron stall
palettes.title: Mounds of sumac, saffron, za'atar, and rose petals under the souk light
palettes.source: Color from the souk: saffron red-gold, sumac maroon, za'atar green, dried-rose pink, and a turmeric yellow.

swatches.name: Dried rose, pink
swatches.note: The rose petals for tea and sweets.

d.text: Deep sumac maroon leads the souk stall.

s.text: Saffron red-gold, za'atar green, and turmeric.

a.text: Dried-rose pink and pistachio as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Dull spice brown. The souk is saturated — sumac maroon, saffron gold, za'atar green — a heaped spectrum, not a brown bin.

palettes.title: Diamond-cut baklava in golden filo, pistachio green, and honey syrup
palettes.source: Color from the sweet tray: filo gold, pistachio green, honey-syrup amber, rose-water pink, and a walnut brown.

d.text: Golden filo leads the sweet tray.

s.text: Pistachio green, honey amber, and brass.

a.text: Rose pink and walnut brown as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat pastry beige. Baklava is glossy gold filo crowned with bright pistachio-green — rich and jewelled, not a dry beige.

palettes.kicker: Saffron rice & tagine · the festive dish
palettes.title: A saffron-jewelled rice and a tagine with apricot, almond, and herb
palettes.source: Color from the dish: saffron-rice gold, tagine-stew brown, apricot orange, pomegranate ruby, and a herb green.

swatches.name: Dried apricot, orange
swatches.note: The sweet fruit in the stew.

d.text: Saffron-rice gold leads the festive dish.

s.text: Stew brown, apricot orange, and almond cream.

a.text: Pomegranate ruby and coriander as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat brown stew. The dish is saffron-gold and apricot-orange jewelled with pomegranate — festive, not a brown pot.

volumes.title: Thai & Southeast Asian
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol VIII · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Southeast-Asian table, lime, chilli, and herb.
preface: Southeast-Asian cooking is electric fresh colour — lime green, chilli red, the purple of shallot and the gold of curry — against banana leaf and the neon of a night market. The palette is bright, sharp, and herbaceous.
Each refuses a muddy 'stir-fry brown': this is a cuisine of vivid lime, chilli, and herb, lit by market neon.

palettes.title: A bowl of green curry with Thai basil and chilli, on a banana leaf
palettes.source: Color from the curry: green-curry green, coconut cream, red-chilli accent, Thai-basil dark green, and a banana-leaf green.

d.text: Herb-green curry leads the bowl.

s.text: Coconut cream, banana-leaf green, and jade eggplant.

a.text: Scarlet chilli and lime leaf as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Brown gravy curry. Thai green curry is vivid herb-green with coconut white and chilli red — fresh and sharp, not a brown stew.

palettes.title: Green papaya salad pounded with tomato, chilli, peanut, and lime
palettes.source: Color from the salad: green-papaya jade, tomato red, peanut tan, chilli scarlet, and a lime green.

d.text: Jade green papaya leads the salad.

s.text: Tomato red, peanut tan, and bean green.

a.text: Scarlet chilli and coral shrimp as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Dull beige slaw. Som tam is jade-green and scarlet — crunchy, fresh, and hot, not a muted shredded salad.

palettes.kicker: Mango sticky rice · the dessert cart
palettes.title: Ripe mango slices beside coconut sticky rice with a mung-bean scatter
palettes.source: Color from the dessert: ripe-mango gold, sticky-rice white, coconut-cream pale, mung-bean yellow, and a pandan green.

d.text: Gold-orange mango leads the dessert.

s.text: White rice, pale coconut, and mung yellow.

a.text: Pandan green and banana-leaf as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Pale bland pudding. Mango sticky rice is vivid gold mango against white rice — a bright contrast, not a beige dessert.

palettes.title: A bowl of beef pho with herbs, lime, chilli, and rare beef in clear broth
palettes.source: Color from the bowl: clear-broth amber, rice-noodle white, rare-beef pink, Thai-basil green, and a red-chilli accent.

swatches.name: Rare beef, pink
swatches.note: The thin raw beef cooking in broth.

d.text: Clear amber broth leads the bowl.

s.text: White noodle, pink beef, and basil green.

a.text: Scarlet chilli and lime as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Murky brown soup. Pho is a clear amber broth with white noodle and fresh herb green — clean and bright, not a brown stew.

volumes.title: American Diner & BBQ
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol IX · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the American table, griddle, smoke, and neon.
preface: American diner and barbecue food is warm and indulgent — griddle browns, ketchup-and-mustard primaries, pie golds, and the deep mahogany of smoked meat — under chrome and neon. The palette is hearty and nostalgic.
Each refuses a greasy single brown: this is a cuisine of ketchup red, mustard yellow, pie gold, and smoke, with chrome shine.

palettes.title: A griddled cheeseburger with ketchup, mustard, and pickle on a sesame bun
palettes.source: Color from the burger: sesame-bun gold, griddled-patty brown, melted-cheese orange, ketchup red, and a pickle green.

d.text: Golden sesame bun is the burger's body.

s.text: Patty brown, cheese orange, and lettuce green.

a.text: Ketchup red and mustard yellow as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Greasy brown blur. The burger is gold bun, orange cheese, and primary ketchup-and-mustard — bright and layered, not a brown lump.

palettes.title: A slice of cherry pie with a strawberry milkshake on a formica counter
palettes.source: Color from the counter: pie-crust gold, cherry-filling red, milkshake pink, formica mint, and a chrome silver.

swatches.name: Milkshake, strawberry pink
swatches.note: The pink shake in the glass.

d.text: Golden pie crust leads the counter.

s.text: Cherry red, milkshake pink, and mint formica.

a.text: Chrome silver and whipped cream as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muted vintage sepia. The diner is candy-bright — cherry red, shake pink, mint counter, chrome — pop nostalgia, not faded brown.

palettes.title: Smoked brisket and ribs with bark, on butcher paper with pickle and white bread
palettes.source: Color from the BBQ tray: mahogany-bark brown, smoke-ring pink, butcher-paper tan, sauce-red, and a pickle-and-slaw green.

swatches.name: Smoke ring, pink
swatches.note: The pink band under the bark.

swatches.name: White bread, pale
swatches.note: The slice of soft white bread.

d.text: Mahogany bark brown is the tray's dominant meat.

s.text: Smoke-ring pink, paper tan, and white bread.

a.text: Sauce red and pickle green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat grey meat. Real BBQ is deep mahogany bark with a pink smoke ring — rich and warm, not a grey boiled-looking cut.

palettes.title: Glazed and frosted donuts in pink, chocolate, and rainbow sprinkles
palettes.source: Color from the case: strawberry-frosting pink, chocolate glaze, vanilla cream, rainbow-sprinkle multi, and a glazed gold.

d.text: Strawberry-frosting pink leads the case.

s.text: Chocolate glaze, gold ring, and vanilla cream.

a.text: Red and blue sprinkles as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muted artisanal beige. The donut case is candy-bright — pink, chocolate, and rainbow sprinkles, full pop colour.

volumes.title: Chinese Cuisine
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol X · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the Chinese table, lacquer red, soy, and tea.
preface: Chinese cuisine ranges from the lacquer-red and gold of a banquet to the chilli-and-Sichuan-pepper red of the west and the pale steam of dim sum. The palette is warm, varied by region, and accented with soy-dark and scallion-green.
Each refuses a single 'takeaway brown': real Chinese colour is lacquer red, chilli, jade, and tea, region by region.

palettes.title: Steamer baskets of har gow, siu mai, and char siu bao with tea
palettes.source: Color from the cart: dumpling-wrapper white, shrimp pink, char-siu red, scallion green, and a soy-sauce brown.

swatches.name: Shrimp filling, pink
swatches.note: The prawn seen through the wrapper.

d.text: Translucent wrapper white leads the steamer.

s.text: Shrimp pink, bamboo tan, and siu-mai gold.

a.text: Char-siu red and scallion green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Brown takeaway sludge. Dim sum is pale steamed white with pink shrimp and red char siu — delicate, not a brown box.

palettes.kicker: Sichuan hot pot · the bubbling cauldron
palettes.title: A red chilli-oil hot pot bubbling with peppercorns, beside fresh dipping plates
palettes.source: Color from the hot pot: chilli-oil red, Sichuan-pepper brown, broth-fat gold, sliced-beef pink, and a coriander green.

d.text: Chilli-oil red dominates the bubbling pot.

s.text: Brick chilli, gold fat, and pink beef.

a.text: Pepper brown and herb green as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Mild brown broth. Sichuan hot pot is a blazing chilli-oil red surface — intense and oily, not a pale brown soup.

palettes.title: Lacquered roast duck carved beside pancakes, scallion, and hoisin on porcelain
palettes.source: Color from the banquet: duck-skin mahogany, pancake cream, hoisin dark-brown, cucumber-and-scallion green, and a porcelain-blue plate.

d.text: Lacquer-mahogany duck skin leads the table.

s.text: Pancake cream, hoisin brown, and green garnish.

a.text: Porcelain blue and rose meat as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat greasy brown. Peking duck is glossy lacquer-mahogany on blue-white porcelain — elegant sheen, not a dull brown roast.

palettes.title: Amber oolong and green tea poured over a wooden gongfu tea tray
palettes.source: Color from the tea: oolong-amber, green-tea jade, clay-teapot brown, porcelain white, and a tea-leaf dark green.

d.text: Amber oolong leads the tea tray.

s.text: Jade green tea, clay pot, and white porcelain.

a.text: Dark leaf and bamboo tan as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Single brown tea. Chinese tea spans amber oolong to jade green over clay and porcelain — a translucent range, not one brown.

volumes.title: Confectionery & Dessert
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol XI · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the sweet shop, chocolate, berry, and sugar.
preface: The dessert palette is indulgent and tactile — chocolate browns, berry brights, candy pastels, and caramel gold — glossy and rich. The colour is appetite itself.
Each refuses a dull beige sweetness: dessert colour is deep chocolate, vivid berry, and glossy caramel, full of contrast.

palettes.title: Tempered dark, milk, and white chocolate with cocoa nibs and gold leaf
palettes.source: Color from the bench: dark-chocolate brown, milk-chocolate caramel, white-chocolate cream, cocoa-nib black, and a gold-leaf accent.

d.text: Deep dark-chocolate brown leads the bench.

s.text: Milk caramel, white cream, and dusty cocoa.

a.text: Cocoa-nib black and gold leaf as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat uniform brown. Chocolate work is a tonal range from near-black to cream, finished with gold — depth, not one brown.

palettes.title: Strawberries, raspberries, and blueberries with whipped cream
palettes.source: Color from the bowl: strawberry red, raspberry crimson, blueberry indigo, cream white, and a mint green.

d.text: Bright strawberry red leads the bowl.

s.text: Crimson raspberry, white cream, and dark blackberry.

a.text: Indigo blueberry and mint as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Pale pastel berry. Real summer berries are saturated red, crimson, and indigo against white cream — vivid, not a washed pastel.

palettes.title: Glass jars of boiled sweets, gummies, and candy canes in pure brights
palettes.source: Color from the jars: candy red, lemon yellow, lime green, blue-raspberry, and a violet-grape.

d.text: Candy red leads the jars.

s.text: Lemon yellow, lime green, and blue raspberry.

a.text: Grape violet and orange as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Muted natural tones. Candy is the one place pure artificial saturation belongs — full-strength primaries, by design.

palettes.title: Bubbling caramel, golden toffee, and burnt-sugar shards on marble
palettes.source: Color from the pan: caramel amber-gold, burnt-sugar brown, toffee tan, cream-fudge pale, and a sea-salt white.

d.text: Amber-gold caramel leads the pan.

s.text: Burnt-sugar brown, toffee tan, and cream fudge.

a.text: Sea-salt white and marble as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat brown sweet. Caramel work spans amber-gold to burnt-brown — a glossy graded warmth, not a single dull brown.

volumes.title: Coffee, Wine & Spirits
volumes.eyebrow: Cuisine · Vol XII · Sourced from Ingredient & Table
volumes.h1: Four palettes from the glass and the cup, crema, ruby, and amber.
preface: Drinks have their own colour grammar — espresso's crema browns, wine's ruby-to-gold, whisky amber, and the jewel tones of cocktails. The palette is liquid, translucent, and warm.
Each refuses a flat 'beverage brown': from crema to claret to chartreuse, drink colour is a rich translucent spectrum.

palettes.title: A pulled espresso with hazel crema in a white cup on a saucer
palettes.source: Color from the cup: crema hazel, espresso black-brown, porcelain white, roasted-bean dark, and a latte-art cream.

swatches.name: Crema, hazel brown
swatches.note: The golden-hazel foam on the shot.

d.text: Hazel crema leads the cup.

s.text: Espresso black-brown, white porcelain, and dark bean.

a.text: Milk cream and copper as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Flat coffee brown. Espresso is hazel crema over near-black on white porcelain — a tonal study, not a single brown.

palettes.title: Glasses from pale pinot to inky syrah held against the light
palettes.source: Color from the flight: deep claret red, ruby pinot, garnet rim, glass clear, and an inky syrah purple.

swatches.name: Claret, deep red
swatches.note: The body of a mature red.

swatches.name: Garnet rim, brown-red
swatches.note: The aged rim against the glass.

swatches.name: Tannin stain, violet
swatches.note: The legs and stain on the glass.

d.text: Deep claret red leads the flight.

s.text: Ruby pinot, garnet rim, and pale glass.

a.text: Inky syrah and violet stain as small reads.

palettes.refuses: Single flat burgundy. Wine is a translucent range from pale ruby to inky purple, lit through glass — depth, not one red.

palettes.title: A row of whiskies from pale grain to deep sherry-cask amber on a wood bar
palettes.source: Color from the bar: whisky amber, pale-gold grain, deep sherry-cask mahogany, ice clear, and a copper-still glow.

swatches.name: Copper still, glow
swatches.note: The gleam of the pot still.

d.text: Amber whisky leads the back bar.

s.text: Pale-gold grain, mahogany sherry, and dark wood.

a.text: Clear ice and copper glow as small reads.

palettes.refuses: One flat amber. Whisky spans pale gold to deep mahogany by cask — a graded amber spectrum, not a single brown.

palettes.title: A negroni, a margarita, and a blue cocktail lined up under bar light
palettes.source: Color from the pass: negroni-red, margarita green-gold, curaçao blue, citrus-twist yellow, and an amber-spirit base.

d.text: Negroni red-orange leads the bar pass.

s.text: Margarita green-gold, curaçao blue, and amber base.

a.text: Citrus yellow and cherry red as small reads.

palettes.refuses: One brown spirit. The cocktail pass is a jewel row — negroni red, margarita gold, curaçao blue — translucent colour, not brown.
